# BitCryptic™

> Gary Walker (BitCryptic™) — systems administrator and infrastructure engineer, Sydney, Australia. Four decades in technology, from early Australian internet infrastructure to co-founding Fetch TV, Australia's first commercial IPTV platform. Current focus: self-hosted AI infrastructure, DePIN, cybersecurity, and open web standards for AI agents.

Primary current work: **MDF (Markdown First)** — an open web standards proposal for an agent-readable web. MDF defines how sites serve clean markdown to AI agents via HTTP content negotiation (`Accept: text/markdown`) at existing URLs, with access policy expressed through price using the x402 (EVM/stablecoin) and L402 (Bitcoin/Lightning) payment standards. Co-authored with Graham Hall (Slepner). MIT licensed.

## MDF — Markdown First

- [MDF Specification (CONCEPT.md)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/bitcryptic-gw/mdf/main/CONCEPT.md): Full proposal and architecture spec, v0.1.0-draft
- [MDF README](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/bitcryptic-gw/mdf/main/README.md): Problem summary, status, live demo links
- [mdf.json JSON Schema](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/bitcryptic-gw/mdf/main/mdf.schema.json): JSON Schema (Draft 2020-12) for the /mdf.json capability document
- [Live MDF demo server](https://mdf-demo.bitcryptic.com/): Working reference implementation with free, Lightning micropayment (1 sat), and premium ($1 USDC) content tiers
- [Demo server capability document](https://mdf-demo.bitcryptic.com/mdf.json): Machine-readable /mdf.json example
- [Demo server llms.txt](https://mdf-demo.bitcryptic.com/llms.txt): Auto-generated content index
- [MDF reference server source](https://github.com/bitcryptic-gw/mdf-reference-server): Self-hostable Bun/Docker implementation, Docker Hub: bitcryptic/mdf-server
- [MDF validator](https://github.com/bitcryptic-gw/mdf-validator): CLI tool for validating MDF deployments
- [MDF Analytics WordPress plugin](https://github.com/bitcryptic-gw/mdf-analytics-wp): Tracks AI agent traffic and Accept: text/markdown requests on WordPress sites

## Blog

- [BitCryptic Blog](https://blog.bitcryptic.com/): Writing on MDF, agent payments, self-hosted infrastructure, and DePIN

## About Gary Walker

- [About / career timeline](https://bitcryptic.com/): Telecom Australia (1985), early Australian ISP co-founder (NetConnect Communications), Fetch TV co-founder and technical lead (2008–2017), independent since 2017
- [GitHub](https://github.com/bitcryptic-gw): All public repositories
- Contact: gary@bitcryptic.com

## Optional

- [Pi Network](https://minepi.com/BitCrypticGW): DePIN — mobile cryptocurrency network participant
- [Acurast](https://hub.acurast.com/): DePIN — decentralised compute; 16 processor phones on mainnet
- [WeatherXM station](https://explorer.weatherxm.com/cells/87be0e228ffffff): DePIN — decentralised weather data contributor
- [Helium Network](https://www.helium.com/): DePIN — LoRaWAN and 5G hotspot operator
- [Wingbits](https://wingbits.com/): DePIN — ADS-B aircraft tracking ground station operator
